content: Self-Refine's iterative, unsupervised self-feedback loop can be grounded as the base framework for implementing multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, where each self-refinement iteration can incorporate a distinct inconsistent problem-solving perspective from Self-Contrast or Mirror-style frameworks. This creates a 'self-refinement of reflection' system that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no extra training or supervision while boosting reflection accuracy by avoiding the narrow bias of a single feedback perspective.
